Wiley X Prescription Eyewear

Wiley X combines cutting-edge lens technology with durable, impact-resistant lenses for unmatched vision clarity, comfort, and safety. We offer customized optical solutions for work, sports, and outdoor adventures.

Why Choose Wiley X?

✔ Custom Prescription Lenses - Tailored for precision vision

✔ ANSI-Rated Safety – High-impact resistance for work and play

✔ Polarized, Non-Polarize, & Photochromic Options – Enhanced clarity in changing light conditions

✔ Durable, Stylish Frames – Designed for comfort and long-lasting wear

✔ 100% UVA/UVB Protection – Keep your eyes shielded from harmful rays

Find the Perfect Prescription Eyewear for Your Needs
  • Prescription Sunglasses – Polarized, impact-resistant lenses for outdoor clarity
  • Prescription Eyeglasses – Everyday Rx frames built for durability and comfort
